name: Cocoa Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Heavy Cream or Non-dairy Cream Substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cocoa, sugar, salt, and heavy cream in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a rolling boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat to low and cook until the temperature reaches 234 degrees F (112 degrees C).
4. Remove from heat and stir in butter and vanilla extract.
5. Cool mixture to lukewarm (approximately 110 degrees F or 43 degrees C).
6. Beat by hand or with a mixer until thickened and glossy.
7. Quickly spread fudge into a lightly buttered 8-inch square pan.
8. Allow to cool completely, then cut into squares.
9. Makes about 49 pieces.
